name: Slardar
description: I guard what slumbers in the deeps. Slardar, the Slithereen Guard Slardar is a Slithereen, one of the Deep Ones, guardian of a vast network of sunken cities and the ancient riches buried within them.

abilities.name: Seaborn Sentinel
abilities.description: Grants Slardar bonus health regeneration, bonus armor, bonus attack damage, and bonus movement speed in certain water-based terrains. Increases both the bonus health regeneration and the bonus armor granted. Slardar additionally has bonus status resistance in certain water-based terrains.

abilities.name: Guardian Sprint
abilities.description: Grants an additional short bonus movement speed and bonus slow resistance upon cast.

abilities.name: Slithereen Crush
abilities.description: Slams the ground, stunning and damaging nearby enemy land units. After the stun, the affected units are slowed. Creates a water-based terrain that grant bonuses to certain abilities of Slardar's.

abilities.name: Corrosive Haze
abilities.description: Reduces the affected enemy target's armor, provides True Sight and vision over it, revealing invisibility. Grants a self armor bonus depending on the total armor reduction applied to all enemy units. Each debuff applied on enemy units grants an independent buff stack.
